grant_title: Vermont Agricultural Funding for Sustainable Practices
eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofits having a 501(c)(3) status with the IRS, other than institutions of higher education
Nonprofits that do not have a 501(c)(3) status with the IRS, other than institutions of higher education
Public and State controlled institutions of higher education
project_area: Agriculture, education, and local communities; youth engagement with food systems, farms, and nutrition education; community-based agricultural learning initiatives
demographic_requirements: Projects must benefit children, youth, and communities in Vermont, with a focus on educational programs, local food access, and community partnerships.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, schools, school districts, afterschool programs, early childhood education providers, community groups, and higher education institutions located in Vermont. Partnerships are encouraged. Small businesses and private individuals are not primary recipients but may participate as collaborators.
